name: @overdeck/core
description: Multi-agent orchestration for AI coding assistants (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI)
author: Edward Becker <edward.becker@gmail.com>

scripts.build: npm run build:contracts && npm run build:pi-extension && npm run build:ohmypi-extension && npm run build:cli && node scripts/build-post-cli.mjs
scripts.build:contracts: node scripts/fs-helper.mjs rmrf packages/contracts/dist && npm --prefix ./packages/contracts run build
scripts.build:dashboard: npm run build:dashboard:frontend && npm run build:dashboard:server
scripts.build:dashboard:server: npm run build:contracts && npm run build:dashboard:server:bundle
scripts.build:dashboard:server:hot: npm run build:contracts:incremental && npm run build:dashboard:server:bundle
scripts.build:dashboard:server:bundle: npm --prefix ./src/dashboard/server run build && node scripts/fs-helper.mjs copy-ext .md src/lib/cloister/prompts dist/dashboard/prompts
scripts.build:desktop: cd apps/desktop && bun run build && bun run dist:linux && bun run dist:mac && bun run dist:win
scripts.build:desktop:linux: cd apps/desktop && bun run build && bun run dist:linux
scripts.build:desktop:mac: cd apps/desktop && bun run build && bun run dist:mac
scripts.build:desktop:win: cd apps/desktop && bun run build && bun run dist:win
scripts.lint: eslint src/ --ext .js,.ts,.tsx --no-inline-config && npm run lint:effect && npm run lint:permissions && npm run lint:state-writes && npm run lint:overdeck-boundaries && npm run lint:skills && npm run lint:prompts && npm run lint:file-size
scripts.prelint:skills: npm run build:contracts && npm run build:pi-extension && npm run build:ohmypi-extension && npm run build:cli
scripts.pretest: npm run build:contracts && npm run build:pi-extension && npm run build:ohmypi-extension && npm run build:cli
scripts.test: vitest run --configLoader runner && npm --prefix ./src/dashboard/frontend run test -- src/lib/__tests__/issueActions.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/issueActions.no-actions-lost.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/issueActions.parity.test.tsx
scripts.test:drizzle-smoke: tsc --noEmit --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck scripts/drizzle-node-sqlite-smoke.ts && node --import tsx scripts/drizzle-node-sqlite-smoke.ts
